title: lappa
intro: Lappa, also known as Nettle-leaf or Tussilago farfara, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lappa include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Lappa can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its effectiveness.
